subject: Re: Warp 1.0.9 Crash
body:
We ran into this specific issue today. Loading settings from a previous, 
successful run recovered it (I am sorry that I didn't save the failed 
previous.settings file so I could share it!).

On Thursday, August 13, 2020 at 4:49:33 AM UTC-7 teg...@gmail.com wrote:

> Hi Shyamal,
>
> I haven't seen this line fail before. Can you share the <CTF></CTF> 
> section from the previous.settings file in that folder? Also, the usual 
> annoying question: What happened between the time it worked and now? :-)
>
> Cheers,
> Dimitry
>
>
> On Thursday, August 13, 2020 at 9:47:10 AM UTC+2, shyamal mosalaganti 
> wrote:
>>
>> Hi Dimitry & others,
>>
>> After i have imported my tilts (each tilt is is motion corrected  average 
>> in .mrc format) i get the following error (attached). 
>> I had successfully run this dataset before without any problems. However, 
>> now it just continuously crashes. 
>> Any idea why this might be happening? 
>>
>> Thank you very much in advance,
>> Shyamal
>>
>
